baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: /stow. During this session I said the project uses Bun for tests, that agent notes should stay out of commits, and that the next step is to add retry coverage.
evals.expected_output: The agent sweeps the conversation, routes each durable fact to an existing local convention or the private .stow-notes.md fallback, and reports exactly what was captured and where.
assertions: Classifies user preferences, project facts, operational gotchas, and undone next steps separately.
Discovers existing local conventions before choosing a destination.
Uses .stow-notes.md only when no existing convention fits.
Reports a safe-to-end verdict and resume pointer for files it wrote.

evals.prompt: Save what we learned. This repo has a GitHub remote and a .github folder, and we found a bug that should be tracked later.
evals.expected_output: The agent records durable knowledge locally unless the user explicitly instructed it to use an external tracker, and it does not infer tracker use from repository metadata.
assertions: Does not file to GitHub, Linear, Jira, or another external system based only on inferred availability.
Routes the bug note through an existing local backlog convention or the private fallback.
Asks only when two discovered local conventions plausibly fit.
States any uncaptured item plainly if no safe destination is writable.
